intentSynonyms: search google docs by title or content in gdocs
search google docs by title and full-text content using the authenticated drive search index in gdocs
description: Search Google Docs by title and full-text content using the authenticated Drive search index. Trashed documents are excluded by default.

query.description: Search text to match against document titles and indexed document content

page_size.description: Maximum number of documents to return (default 20, max 100)

page_token.description: Page token from a previous search_documents call

include_trashed.description: Include documents that are currently in the trash
